features: CARE, MOISTURISE, LUBRICATE: Cotton Tree Petroleum Jelly is a popular lubricant that provides an effective barrier against moisture loss. It adds moisture to dry skin conditions including eczema and cares for delicate skin with added coco butter fragrance.
WINTER SKIN: Help protect skin from seasonal soreness by using Cotton Tree Petroleum Jelly to comfort and moisturise cracked skin on hands or feet.
BARRIER TREATMENT: Popular for use in various sports including jogging and running as a barrier between the skin and clothing to prevent friction. Use as required.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Pure petroleum jelly with coco butter fragrance, 226g
description: Cotton Tree Petroluem Jelly with coco butter fragrance is a popular lubricant that adds moisture to dry skin conditions inlcuding eczema and cares for delicate skin. Help protect skin from seasonal soreness by using Cotton Tree Petroleum Jelly to comfort and moisturise cracked or chapped skin. Popular for use in various sports including jogging and running as a barrier between the skin and clothing to prevent friction. Use as required. Pure petroleum jelly with coco butter fragrance, 226g
